title: Versioned CC-BY dataset release (CSV/Parquet/JSON) + Zenodo DOI
context: The public deliverable is a versioned, openly licensed dataset release with a minted DOI and a transparent coverage ledger. This task packages and publishes that release. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Publish a semver-tagged CC-BY dataset release (CSV/Parquet/JSON) with a minted Zenodo DOI, changelog, and a 'what's covered / what's missing' ledger; 100% of records pass all gates.
acceptanceCriteria: 100% of records pass schema + provenance + min-cell + no-unsourced-number gates.
Semver-tagged release, Zenodo DOI minted, changelog + 'what's covered / what's missing' ledger published.
Release artifacts provided in CSV, Parquet, and JSON.
output: /output/release/ versioned dataset artifacts (CSV/Parquet/JSON) + changelog + coverage ledger, with a minted Zenodo DOI.
